## takumi env setup

Create runtime environments for packages

### Synopsis

Run user-defined runtime.setup commands to create isolated environments.
If no packages are specified, sets up environments for all packages that
define a runtime section.

```
takumi env setup [packages...] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for setup
```

### SEE ALSO

* [takumi env](takumi_env.md)	 - Manage per-package runtime environments
